mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.did, d.name as dname, d.tele as dtele FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptId = d.did WHERE e.state = '1'

SELECT e.*, d.did, d.name as dname, d.tele as dtele FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptId = d.did WHERE e.state = '1'
AND e.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT e.*, d.did, d.name as dname, d.tele as dtele FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptId = d.did WHERE e.eid = #{id}
SELECT e.*, d.did, d.name as dname, d.tele as dtele FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptId = d.did WHERE e.username = #{username} AND e.state = '1'
SELECT e.*, d.did, d.name as dname, d.tele as dtele FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptId = d.did WHERE e.username = #{username} AND e.pwd = #{pwd} AND e.state = '1'
SELECT e.*, d.did, d.name as dname, d.tele as dtele FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptId = d.did WHERE e.eid = #{eid} AND e.pwd = #{pwd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp (username, pwd, name, gender, email, tele, address, birthday, deptId, state) VALUES (#{username}, #{pwd}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{email}, #{tele}, #{address}, #{birthday}, #{dept.did}, #{state})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp SET pwd = #{pwd} WHERE eid = #{eid}
mapper.delete: UPDATE emp SET state = '0' WHERE eid = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp WHERE state = '1'
SELECT e.*, d.did, d.name as dname, d.tele as dtele FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptId = d.did WHERE e.state = '1'
